CustomField.description: The Effective Ratio will be displayed the same as the Calculated FH, unless the utilization period includes an Assumed Ratio for reconciliation or is influenced by the option selected in the Ratio Table Choice set under Supplemental Rent Rate. For example, if the Ratio Table Choice is set to 'Nearest and Interpolate,' the Effective Ratio will be the adjusted value, which may differ from the calculated one.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Effective Ratio will be displayed the same as the Calculated FH, unless the utilization period includes an Assumed Ratio for reconciliation.
CustomField.label: Effective FH:FC Ratio
